fields.profile_discription: A profile picture helps personalize your account

profileImage.title: Profile Picture
profileImage.description: A picture helps people recognize you and lets you know when you're signed in to your account

name.title: Full Name
name.description: Changes to your name will appear in your Nitx Account.
name.error: Failed to update name. Please try again.

language.title: Language Preference
language.description: Choose your preferred language for easy communication.

email.title: Email
email.description: The address used to identify your Nitx Account to you and others.
email.editDescription: Enter your new email address. You'll need to verify it with a code.
email.otpDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your new email address.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.sameEmail: New email must be different from current email
errors.sendOTP: Failed to send OTP. Please try again.
errors.verifyOTP: Failed to verify OTP. Please try again.

success.otpSent: OTP sent to your new email address

mobile.title: Manage Phone Number
mobile.description: Nitx will use this phone number to help you sign in and alert you if they detect unusual activity on your account.
mobile.otpDescription: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your phone number.
mobile.phoneNumber: Select country code and enter phone number
mobile.howToReceiveCodes: How do you want to receive login code?
mobile.error: Failed to send OTP. Try again.

description.email: We'll send an OTP to your email address to verify your identity.
description.otp: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to your email address.
description.password: Choose a strong password and make sure to remember it.

errors.password: Password must be at least 8 characters

strength.weak_helper: Use 8+ characters with upper/lowercase, numbers, and symbols.

VerifyMethodsSelector.title: Choose a Verification Method
VerifyMethodsSelector.description: The OTP can be sent via email, SMS, or through an Authenticator app and must be entered within a short time before it expires.

otp.title: Verify OTP
otp.description: Please enter the verification code sent to your authenticator.

authenticator.title: Authenticator App
authenticator.description: Link an authenticator app to add an extra layer of security to your account with time-based verification codes.
authenticator.introMessage: Authenticator app generates time-based verification codes that you can use to verify your identity. It works even when your phone is offline, making it one of the most secure verification methods available.
authenticator.downloadMessage: To get started, you'll need an authenticator app installed on your phone.
authenticator.qrDescription: Open your authenticator app, tap the + icon, and scan the QR code below.
authenticator.scanQRCode: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
authenticator.couldNotLoad: We couldn't generate your QR code. Please go back and try again.
authenticator.otpDescription: Enter the 6-digit code displayed in your authenticator app to complete the setup.
authenticator.enterCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code currently shown in your authenticator app
authenticator.successDescription: Your authenticator app has been successfully linked to your account.

errors.failedToConfirm: Verification failed. Please check your code and try again.
errors.failedToLoad: Failed to generate authenticator setup. Please try again.
errors.couldNotLoad: Could not load setup data. Please try again.

enable2FA.title: Enable Two-Factor Authentication
enable2FA.confirmDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account by enabling 2FA.
enable2FA.confirmMessage: When enabled, you'll need to verify your identity using an authenticator app, email, or SMS each time you sign in. This helps protect your account from unauthorized access.
enable2FA.successDescription: Two-factor authentication has been successfully enabled.

errors.failedToEnable: Failed to enable two-factor authentication. Please try again.

success.enabled: Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully!

disable2FA.title: Disable Two-Factor Authentication
disable2FA.warnMessage: Disabling two-factor authentication will make your account less secure. You'll only need your password to sign in, which makes your account more vulnerable to unauthorized access. We recommend keeping 2FA enabled for better protection.
disable2FA.selectMethodDescription: Choose a verification method to confirm disabling 2FA.
disable2FA.otpDescription: Enter the code to verify your identity and disable 2FA.
disable2FA.successDescription: Two-factor authentication has been disabled for your account.
disable2FA.chooseMethod: Choose how you want to verify:
disable2FA.authAppOption: Get a verification code from the Authenticator app
disable2FA.enterCodeDescription: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm disabling 2FA

errors.failedToRequestOTP: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
errors.failedToVerify: Failed to verify code. Please try again.

success.disabled: Two-factor authentication has been disabled successfully!

requestFromNitx.title: Request From Nitx
requestFromNitx.description: You are currently logged in to your account on these devices that allow receiving requests.

description.step2: You can receive login codes at these numbers. You can also add additional numbers that can be used to recover your Nitx Account.
description.step3: Nitx will use this phone number to help you sign in and alert you if they detect unusual activity on your account.

phoneNumber.howToReceiveCodes: How do you want to receive login code?
phoneNumber.codesSentVia: Codes are sent via text message.

recoveryEmail.title: Recovery Email
recoveryEmail.description: We use your account recovery email to contact you if we detect unusual activity on your account or if you have been locked out of your account by mistake.

recoveryPhoneNumber.title: Email
recoveryPhoneNumber.description: The address used to identify your Nitx Account to you and others. You can't change this address.

newSpace.title: Create New Space
newSpace.inviteLabel: Invite someone by adding their email

manageMembers.title: Edit Space
manageMembers.inviteLabel: Invite someone by adding their email

dob.title: Date of Birth
dob.description: Update your date of birth for your Nitx Account.

error.ageRequirement: You must be at least 16 year old
error.failedToUpdate: Failed to update Date of Birth. Please try again.

addPaymentMethod.title: Add Payment Method
addPaymentMethod.description: Add a new payment method to your account.

cancelLicense.title: Are you sure you want to cancel this license?

browseSpacesModal.title: Browse spaces
browseSpacesModal.emptyDescription: Try a different search term or create a new space.

newSpaceModal.title: Create New Space
newSpaceModal.description: Create spaces to help manage screens and content.

manageMembersModal.title: Members & Numbers
manageMembersModal.inviteTeammatesDescription: Invite teammates to start collaborating in this space.
manageMembersModal.wrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.

emptyList.defaultDescription: There is nothing to show here yet.

memberItem.managerDescription: Can manage content, settings, and members

membersManager.title: Add Members
membersManager.description: Type or paste email addresses below, separated by commas. Your workspace will be billed by members.
membersManager.successDescription: Invited users will receive an email to join your space.

viewer.description: Can view content and data only, without making any changes.

editor.description: Can edit and update content, but cannot manage settings or users.

manager.description: Full control to manage content, settings, and user permissions.

owner.description: Full ownership of the space, including billing, settings, and member permissions.

renameSpaceModal.title: Rename Space
renameSpaceModal.description: Update the space name to keep your workspace organized and easy to find.
renameSpaceModal.defaultError: Failed to rename this space. Please try again.

removeMemberDialog.title: Remove {{email}} from Space?
removeMemberDialog.description: They have been an active Nitx member. Removing them may cause loss of private pages.

cancelInvitationDialog.title: Cancel invitation for {{email}}?
cancelInvitationDialog.description: This invite is still pending. Cancelling it will remove access to this invitation link.
